languages.text: {n}Спустя несколько секунд вы слышите громкий топот бегущих людей. Запыхавшаяся Лария Войгтвир в сопровождении блюстителей стремительно поднимается на стену.{/n} "Во имя Бога-Императора, что здесь происходит?!"
languages.translation_comment:
К нам прибегает Лария и пара блюстителей
Спикер Лария

К нам прибегает Лария и пара блюстителей
Спикер Лария

languages.text: {n}A few seconds later, you hear the heavy footsteps of people running. A breathless Laria Voigtvir, escorted by enforcers, is rapidly ascending the wall.{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, what is going on here?"
languages.original_text: {n}Спустя несколько секунд вы слышите громкий топот бегущих людей. Запыхавшаяся Лария Войгтвир в сопровождении блюстителей стремительно поднимается на стену.{/n} "Во имя Бога-Императора, что здесь происходит?!"

traits.locale_text: {n}A few seconds later, you hear the heavy footsteps of people running. A breathless Laria Voigtvir, escorted by wardens, is rapidly ascending the wall.{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, what is going on here?"

{n}A few seconds later, you hear the heavy footsteps of people running. A breathless Laria Voigtvir, escorted by wardens, is rapidly ascending the wall.{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, what is going on here?"

{n}A few seconds later, you hear the heavy footsteps of people running. A breathless Laria Voigtvir, escorted by wardens, is rapidly ascending the wall.{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, what is going on here?"

languages.text: {n}Unos segundos más tarde, oyes los pasos pesados de personas a la carrera. Una Laria Voigtvir sin aliento, escoltada por guardias, asciende rápidamente por el muro.{/n} «En nombre del Dios Emperador, ¿qué sucede aquí?».
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, you hear the heavy footsteps of people running. A breathless Laria Voigtvir, escorted by enforcers, is rapidly ascending the wall.{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, what is going on here?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Unos segundos más tarde, oyes los pasos pesados de personas a la carrera. Una Laria Voigtvir sin aliento, escoltada por guardias, asciende rápidamente por el muro.{/n} «En nombre del Dios Emperador, ¿qué sucede aquí?».

languages.text: {n}几秒钟后，你听到沉重的脚步声——有人正在奔跑。气喘吁吁的菈丽雅·维特威尔在执法者的护送下正快步登上城墙。{/n}“神皇在上，这里到底发生了什么？”
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, you hear the heavy footsteps of people running. A breathless Laria Voigtvir, escorted by enforcers, is rapidly ascending the wall.{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, what is going on here?"

traits.locale_text: {n}几秒钟后，你听到沉重的脚步声——有人正在奔跑。气喘吁吁的菈丽雅·维特威尔在执法者的护送下正快步登上城墙。{/n}“神皇在上，这里到底发生了什么？”

languages.text: {n}Quelques secondes plus tard, vous entendez les pas lourds de soldats en train de courir. Escortée par des prévôts, une Laria Voigtvir hors d'haleine escalade rapidement la paroi.{/n} « Au nom de l'Empereur-Dieu, que se passe-t-il ici ? »
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, you hear the heavy footsteps of people running. A breathless Laria Voigtvir, escorted by enforcers, is rapidly ascending the wall.{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, what is going on here?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Quelques secondes plus tard, vous entendez les pas lourds de soldats en train de courir. Escortée par des prévôts, une Laria Voigtvir hors d'haleine escalade rapidement la paroi.{/n} « Au nom de l'Empereur-Dieu, que se passe-t-il ici ? »

languages.text: {n}Birkaç saniye sonra koşan insanların ağır ayak seslerini duyuyorsun. İnfazcıların eşlik ettiği, nefes nefese kalmış Laria Voigtvir hızla duvara tırmanıyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator adına... Burada neler oluyor?"
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, you hear the heavy footsteps of people running. A breathless Laria Voigtvir, escorted by enforcers, is rapidly ascending the wall.{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, what is going on here?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Birkaç saniye sonra koşan insanların ağır ayak seslerini duyuyorsun. İnfazcıların eşlik ettiği, nefes nefese kalmış Laria Voigtvir hızla duvara tırmanıyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator adına... Burada neler oluyor?"

languages.text: {n}Einige Sekunden später hörst du die schweren Schritte laufender Menschen. Eine atemlose Laria Voigtvir stürmt in Begleitung einiger Enforcer auf die Mauer.{/n} "Im Namen des Gottimperators, was ist hier los?"
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, you hear the heavy footsteps of people running. A breathless Laria Voigtvir, escorted by enforcers, is rapidly ascending the wall.{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, what is going on here?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Einige Sekunden später hörst du die schweren Schritte laufender Menschen. Eine atemlose Laria Voigtvir stürmt in Begleitung einiger Enforcer auf die Mauer.{/n} "Im Namen des Gottimperators, was ist hier los?"

languages.text: {n}数秒後、人々が走っている重たい足音が聞こえる。息を切らして、執行官に護衛され、壁を急いで登っていくラリア・ヴォイストヴィル。{/n}「神皇帝の名において、何が起きているのですか？」
languages.original_text: {n}A few seconds later, you hear the heavy footsteps of people running. A breathless Laria Voigtvir, escorted by enforcers, is rapidly ascending the wall.{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, what is going on here?"

traits.locale_text: {n}数秒後、人々が走っている重たい足音が聞こえる。息を切らして、執行官に護衛され、壁を急いで登っていくラリア・ヴォイストヴィル。{/n}「神皇帝の名において、何が起きているのですか？」
